parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  cluster_id: $json.cluster_id,
  title: $json.title,
  subtitle: $json.subtitle,
  slug: $json.slug,
  excerpt: $json.excerpt,
  body_markdown: $json.body_markdown,
  body_html: $json.body_html,
  language: $json.language,
  editorial_score: $json.editorial_score,
  confidence_score: $json.confidence_score,
  status: $json.status,
  tone_profile: $json.tone_profile,
  model_info: $json.model_info,
  moderation: $json.moderation
} }}
